title: Moss Ruins
description: A vanilla-like datapack adding new content to embrace some parts of the boring birch forest biomes by adding a new set of structures which spawn as small single buildings or big ruined cities
body:
Moss Ruins datapack is a vanilla-like addition of new structures being added to the normally boring birch forests, they vary from being a single building, or they spawn as a large cities scattered around these forests.
It adds up a little bit of spice to birch forests, and if you want to, you can use the Terralith datapack with it by using another version of it.

I hope you'll get happy by encountering these ambient or content structures!
